task.title: Create and Activate a Virtual Environment

prereq.p: Miniconda must be installed and the VS Code terminal must recognise the conda command.

step.cmd: Open the terminal in VS Code.
Create a new environment named nlp-course with Python 3.10:

info.note: This command downloads and sets up a fresh, isolated Python installation. It may take a minute.

step.cmd: When prompted, type y and press Enter to confirm.

step.stepresult: The terminal prompt now shows (nlp-course) at the beginning, confirming the environment is active.

result.p: The nlp-course virtual environment is active. Any packages you install now will be contained within this environment.
